name: Urban Payday Loans
description_short: Urban Payday Loans is a free online matching service that connects borrowers with third-party payday and personal loan lenders via a simple inquiry form.
description_long:
Urban Payday Loans operates as an online loan-referral platform based in San Diego, California (7854 Ronson Rd, San Diego, CA 92111; (619) 257-4414). The company positions itself as a free intermediary that connects consumers seeking short-term or emergency financing with a network of third-party lenders and marketers. Critically, Urban Payday Loans is not a lender — the company explicitly states it does not originate, underwrite, or fund loans of any kind, and makes no credit decisions.

The platform's core offering is a short online inquiry form that consumers complete at no charge. Upon submission, the service attempts to match the applicant with lenders in its network that may offer bad credit loans, personal loans, and unsecured loans. Lenders in the network advertise fast and easy approval, soft credit inquiries on select products, next-business-day funding on some loans, and no pre-payment penalties on most products. The service markets itself as accessible to consumers across all credit score ranges, including those with poor or damaged credit.

Urban Payday Loans differentiates itself through its no-cost consumer model — borrowers are not charged any fee for submitting a request or being connected to lenders. The platform employs 256-bit SSL encryption and TLS security protocols for data protection. Speed and simplicity are central to its pitch: a short form, an instant conditional response, and the possibility of next-business-day funding. The company also highlights a 'friendly service' and positions itself as catering to underbanked or credit-challenged borrowers who may be turned away elsewhere.

Consumers should approach Urban Payday Loans with a clear-eyed understanding of its actual function: a lead generator. Submitting the inquiry form authorizes the sharing of personal and financial data with third-party lenders and marketing partners. The website provides zero transparency on APRs, fees, or the identity of specific lenders in the network. The platform discloses it may route applicants to tribal lenders, who are not subject to state usury caps and may charge extremely high interest rates. Loan approval is not guaranteed, and all final terms — including rate, amount, and repayment schedule — are set entirely by the matched lender.
pros: Free service — no fee charged to consumers for form submission or lender matching
Accepts applicants with all credit scores, including bad and poor credit
256-bit SSL encryption and TLS security protocols protect submitted data
Lenders in network offer next-business-day funding on some products
Soft credit inquiries available on select loans through matched lenders
No pre-payment penalties on most loans offered by network lenders
Simple, short online inquiry form with instant conditional response
cons: Not a direct lender — cannot guarantee approval, rates, or loan terms
Personal and financial data is shared with third-party lenders AND marketing partners upon submission
Network may include tribal lenders not bound by state usury laws, potentially allowing extremely high APRs
No transparency on lender fees, APRs, or network lender identities before form submission
Service not available in all states
best_for: Borrowers with bad or poor credit who have been declined by traditional lenders
Consumers needing small emergency cash quickly and willing to compare multiple lender offers at once
San Diego-area residents seeking payday or short-term personal loan options
Applicants who want a no-cost matching service rather than applying to lenders individually
diagnosis: Urban Payday Loans is best for credit-challenged borrowers in San Diego who need emergency cash fast and want to reach multiple lenders with a single free form. The critical caveat is that it is a pure lead generator — not a lender — so submitting the form means broad data sharing with marketers, and there is no rate or fee transparency until a lender contacts the applicant directly.
services: Online loan inquiry and matching service
Soft credit inquiry options (on select lender products)
